lesson.menu_title: Closing the Deal -- Signing & Contract Terms
lesson.subtitle: Aula 13 -- Closing the Deal: Signing & Contract Terms
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Eduarda | Aula 13 -- Closing the Deal

listenings.text: Thank you for sending the final draft. Our legal team has reviewed the terms and conditions, and they are clear. We have one note: if the company defaults on a payment, we will need a thirty-day cure period in writing before any action. If you accept that, the agreement will be binding and enforceable. Once both parties sign, we will execute the contract this Friday.

Hi, this is a quick update on the closing. Good news -- the creditors have approved the final terms. If they sign by Thursday, we will execute the contract on Friday. Unless something changes, the deal will be fully binding next week. One small point remains: they want the cure period confirmed in writing. I think we will close this without any further sticking points. Let us talk before the signing.

extra_audio.text: Both parties agree on the final terms and conditions. The lawyers prepare a binding draft for review. Each side confirms any changes in writing. The signatories execute the contract. The agreement becomes enforceable on the closing date.
